## Summary

### Issue 1 — Stat gen and sprite gen run in parallel per mob

**File:** `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/workflows/mob_gen_wf.py`

The old code ran in two sequential batches: (1) generate ALL stats one-by-one, saving each, then (2) launch ALL sprites in parallel. The new code defines a `process_mob(entity)` coroutine that runs the full pipeline for one mob: `generate_mob_stats` → `save_mob_stats` → `generate_mob_sprite`. All mob ...(truncated)
